repository-basic.label: Repository basic
repository-basic.description: Checks patch whitespace and merge-marker problems.

node-project.label: Node project
node-project.description: Runs the Node test suite and Git patch checks.

verified-run.label: Verified run E2E
verified-run.description: Runs tests, syntax checks, a temporary server health probe, dashboard shell probe, and Git patch checks.

document-review.label: Document review
document-review.description: Checks changed writing for structure, placeholders, merge markers, and relative links.

brainstorm-review.label: Brainstorm review
brainstorm-review.description: Checks brainstorm artifacts by role, including spec impact, recommendation status, and experiment separation.

failure-dedupe-regression.label: Failure dedupe regression
failure-dedupe-regression.description: Ensures repeated failure events do not explode into duplicate file-level cases.
